title: Resolve issues with your T4A slip - T4A COVID-19 amounts - Canada.ca
content:
## T4A COVID-19 amounts
- Go to navigation menu
- Skip to main content

## Resolve issues with your T4A slip
If you find an issue on your T4A slip, call the CRA right away to resolve it.
For any of the following:
- Your T4A slip shows an incorrect amount (refer to: Verify your benefit amounts )
- Your T4A slip shows incorrect personal information such as SIN or address
- You did not apply for COVID-19 benefits, but received a T4A slip
Have the following ready, where applicable:
- Benefit type (CWLB, CRB, CRCB, CRSB, CERB, CESB)
- Eligibility period you repaid or applied for
- Amount and date of any repayment
8:00 am to 8:00 pm ET
Closed on public holidays
After you’ve called the CRA, you will get either an amended or cancelled T4A slip if a correction to your COVID-19 benefit amounts is required. Keep your amended or cancelled T4A slip for your records.
- If you still have to file your 2023 tax return – Use the amended T4A slip to report your COVID-19 benefit amounts on your tax return
- If you already filed your 2023 tax return with your original T4A slip – You must wait until your return is assessed before you can make a request to change your return

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
